baseSpeed.name: Base Speed
baseSpeed.description: Starting race speed in track units per second.

speedRamp.name: Speed Ramp
speedRamp.description: How quickly the race pace escalates with distance.

trafficIntensity.name: Traffic Intensity
trafficIntensity.description: Rival car density and double-car pattern frequency.

steeringGrip.name: Steering Grip
steeringGrip.description: How quickly the player car catches up to drag input.

trafficSpeed.name: Traffic Speed
trafficSpeed.description: How fast rival cars move in the same direction as the player.

effectsIntensity.name: Effects Intensity
effectsIntensity.description: Strength of sparks, screen shake, and speed streaks.
